description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a light oak finish, featuring a flat top surface and open front shelving. The front side displays two horizontal shelves divided by a central vertical support, creating four open compartments for storage or display. The back panel is solid with a horizontal cutout near the top, likely for cable management or ventilation. Both side panels are plain, showing the wood grain texture and supporting the structure. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for use as a TV stand, media console, or general storage in urban environments. The visible construction suggests it is made primarily of engineered wood or particleboard, with no visible handles, doors, or glass panels.
description: A light oak-finished wooden shelving unit with open front compartments and a solid back panel, designed for storage or display. Its minimalist, rectangular form is suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: The back view shows a solid wood panel with a horizontal cutout near the top, likely for cable management.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, flat wood panel with visible grain and no openings or features.
description_view_2: The front view displays two open shelves divided into four compartments by a central vertical support, with no doors or handles.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wood panel with no additional features.
